title: Device Settings - List of supported settings vs UI headset spec
scenario: Verify that headset settings listed in Poly Studio Mobile app match the headset UI specification for supported devices
steps: 1. Acquire the headset UI specification document for the tested Poly Bluetooth headset.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Ensure the headset is connected via Bluetooth.
4. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Scroll through the list of available settings in Device Settings.
6. Compare each setting item against the headset UI specification document.
7. Verify that all settings defined in the spec (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Audio Settings, Notifications) are present in the app.
expected: All supported headset settings from the UI specification are present in the Poly Studio Mobile app under Device Settings.
